name: Besan Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chickpea flour with a little bit of water at a time, until you have a thick batter.
2. Add salt and garlic powder to the batter.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over low heat.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, forming small patties.
5. When the besan turns golden brown, use a strainer to lift it onto a dry pan.
6. Cut potatoes into small pieces and add them to a bowl.
7. Chop onions and sauté with leftover oil in the skillet.
8. Add coriander, cumin, turmeric, and mustard powders to the onions.
9. Mix in the potato pieces thoroughly.
10. Add 1/4 cup of water and continue cooking until the potatoes are soft.
11. Grate ginger into small pieces and add it to the curry.
12. Add the tomato to the pan when the potatoes feel tender.
13. Cover and cook until the potato is cooked through.
14. Add the fried besan to the curry.
15. Adjust salt to taste.
16. Serve warm as a side dish.
